name: @bytechef/embedded-workspace
description: Workspace for ByteChef Embedded SDK development

scripts.setup:link: cd library && npm run build && npm link && cd ../test-apps && npm link @bytechef/embedded
scripts.publish:library: cd library && npm run build && npm run publish:local
scripts.clean: rm -rf library/dist library/node_modules test-apps/.next test-apps/node_modules verdaccio-storage
